choices: To kimbely being chased by coconia the cocoon moster
to trini  being chase by sticktoria
1.content:
One trying evening after the most recent monster had bee defeated by the power rangers Rita came storming through the golden doors of the Moon place.
“Oh Zed I have a head ache it seems that no monsters of our will ever match the skill and cunning of those awful rangers.”
Zed raised his head up from the pillow “We have this same conversation every night. Tomorrow we will just make a stronger monster.”
“But zed I want to be able to settle down rule earth and have a family.” Rita voice getting steadily higher in pitch.
“ Ok tomorrow I will make sure I create a monster to destroy the rangers”. Zed huffed.
“But that won’t work we tried it a billon time already. What if we just capture the rangers and turn the in to our daughters that way we can get rid of the rangers and have our own loyal little monsters helping to rule earth.” Rita gushed
“Ok Whatever just let me get some sleep.” Zed remarked as he pouched his pillow
1.title: The conversation that stats it all

11.content:
Kim was in the park reading her english book that was chosen to be her homework."I really do hate homework i wish something could just happend"said kim to herself in complete boredom.
Suddenly lord Zedd and a dozen of putties appeared behind her,"Hello pink ranger,now it's time to come with your new family"declared Zedd.
Kim got up from her spot and got into a fighting pose and said "Its morphin time"Kim 's entire body got covered in pink armor.
putties suddenly attacked Kim,one puttie landed his fist into her gut,causing Kim to be doubled over as the other putties got on top of her and landed blows all over her body causing her to suffer all the pain she did to all the other putties.
Zedd than disspeared and was replaced with a horrible monster that looked like a giant butterfly.The monster spitted out a liquid over all over kim's body and suddenly solidified casuing kim to be stuck in one place
11.title: To kimbely being chased by coconia the cocoon m...

111.content:
kim slowely awoke,still morphed in zedd's dark castle,she soon realized there was a collar around her neck,with wires attached to it.she looked up and found lord zedd right in front of her staring at his soon to be daughter.

Now it's up to you if you want the easy way or the hard and painful way
111.title: to zedds castle

choices: Continue from a third person point of view
1111.content:
"FINSTER!!!" Rita Yelled out as she was eagerly smiling at Kimberly who was at one point her enemy.

" Yes my evil Queen" Finster said as he walked in with his hands covered in Putty clay, the hours he spent working with Putties have given him almost putty like hands.

" I need you to make me a monster that can do the unthinkable.!!" Rita said as she smiled at Kimberly and thought to herself how to do it. How to make Her the daughter of Zedd and Rita and do it right. She thought back to all the times Master Vial, would train her when she was growning up. How to make it so she could make all of the lessons into the Pink Ranger. Rita then had the most Diabolical Idea ever. She suddenly realized how evil the plan would be and how pure it would be.

As she spoke to Finster, Kimberly Started to wake up and try to move. " What ever it is your doing it won't work RITA!!!" Kimberly said as she began to break free, RIta zapped her with her magic wand and incased her in an energy field.

"There is no reason to fit you Pinky, soon you will be ours." Rita said as she softly said this to Kim. Which scared Kim," why isn't Rita Shouting this?"

" Finster I need a special kind of Monster, I need a Monster of Master Vial, and along with that I need the Red flame Candle." Rita said as she left the chamber and went to her spell books.

Finster got to work on the Monster as Rita came back with a very old book, and it was a very old book with warn edges and was about to fall apart. The book looked like it was made from flesh and it was all dried out. Rita began to say the spell out loud in from of the putties and Kimberely who was still in the energy field. As she began to focus her power in an area of the chamber, a chamber appeared and it had markings all over it. Kimberely couldn't understand waht they were.

" What the heck is that ?" Kimberly said, as she hit the field and tried again to get free, during Rita and Finster's absences Kimberly continued to try to break free to little effort.

" Your days as a Power Rangers have only helped me keep you my dear. That energy field is designed to house the power Coin and the effects of its Power. HAHAHAHAHAHA" Rita laughed as she was handed the Red Flame Candle by FInster.

'What?' This whole time I have been morphed, and it is keeping me in the field.....Do I dare power down to escape?' Kimberely thought to herself as she continued to bang on the field. Rita lite the red Candle.

Kimberly was witnessing as Master Vials Clone was created. " AHHHHH I am ready My dear."

" Yes you are my Vial, YES you are hahahahaha" Rita said as she began to mark the candle.

Kimberly knew what she had to do, she looked around and saw that the putties were all standing there. 'Are they awake?' She thought, ' No time to think about it'. "Power Down!" Kimberly said as she extended her arm out her morpher went into her hand. She threw it behind the Putties as she did a front flip towards them

" AHHHH" RIta said as she zapped Kimberly in air, She put a field around Kimberly that froze her in place. " I knew you would eventually drop your guard. Putties Bring me the morpher, and Bring me the Girl." Rita said as she brought Kimberly to the ground the Putties all activated and grabber Kim's Morhper. The brought her to Rita. Who was smiling and glaring at Kim.

Rita continued to smile as she was handed the morpher. She dripped the wax from the candle onto the morhper. It then Incased it with in a red Crystal. Rita continued to Smile at Kimberly and not say a work.

"You'll never get away with this!!!" Kimberly said as she tried to break free from the putties.

"Oh sweaty I have already won." RIta said as she picked up the crystal and placed it in the giant whole in her staff. It floated there as a pink energy was released from it.

" The best part is, you wont remember any of this. HAHAHAHAHA" Rita said as she quickly lowered her staff and zapped Kimberly with an energy blast.
1111.title: simple

11111.content:
Rita continued to Unleash Her powerful blast on Kimberly who only had a second to think.

" AHHHHHHH" As the wave of energy pierced Kimberly, she felt as if her whole body was being put to sleep. She could barely stand, the putties held her in place. As Kimberly continued to ravel in the pain that the beam was giving her. Rita stopped. She drew her staff back, and leaned on it. As Kimberly slowly brought her self back to a stance.

" Bye Bye" Rita said, as she smiled at Kimberly, who had no time to react. He arms began to shrink into her pink top with a Jean jacket Vest over it. Her head also Shrank down and as the putties released her her legs shrank into her Jean shorts and Belt. As all of her clothes fell to the ground Lord Vial, asked " What happened to her?"

" Oh Vial, if only you were the real one." Rita said as she walked up to the pile of clothes that once were on the Pink Ranger. She sifted through the clothing and pulled out a human baby. Rita grabbed the pink shirt and wrapped it around her.

" My mistress....." Finster said as he and everyone in the room put it together.

" She is my new daughter HAHAHAHAHAHA" RIta said as she held Kimberly her new baby Daughter close.

" Ah that is just evil!!!" I love it." Lord Zedd said as he entered the chamber. Goldar and The rest of the army of evil came in. Goldar looked around and saw the odd chamber that Rita Created.

" What is this for ? " Goldar asked as he pointed it out.

"Master Vial, Take our daughter into the chamber please. Haven't you guessed it Zeddy, I don't want a baby for a daughter. I want a fully grown daughter who will be the very evil creature we could create. I made a time chamber. WIth my clone Master vial and Out daughter she will grow to the age of the Power Ranger in a matter of Minutes. While in there she will age and learn from the Vial."


Zedd turns red, this is the most evil but simple plot he could of ever thought of. " Begin my evil wife. Begin!!!!"

As Lord Vial took the baby from RIta and entered the chamber all of the monster laughed, and began to celebrate. Once inside Rita closed the door.

" Oh FInster I forgot to mention. ... Make me a putty that looks like the Ranger did, we need her to go and fool the others while our daughter grows. HAHAHAHAHA"
11111.title: Continue from a third person point of view

choices: They now serve Rita and her daughter.
111112.content:
" How did you do it?" Zedd asked Rita as she paced around the Chamber waiting for it to open. Zedd was sitting at his throne with his staff in hand and with his other hand he held on to the arm rest. He was also waiting patiently and tapping his fingers on the rest. Goldar, Squat and Baboon, were all waiting patiently and at attention.

" So do you think she will be all evil and stuff?" Squat asked Baboon, " Quiet ....We don't want to disturb the Mistress." He replied.

" She will be nothing like you know of. She will be completely different then she was." Rita said as she approached the trio. Goldar was about to say something when." This changes everything, with this new candle wax I can redo almost anything and everyone." Rita said as she looked eye to eye to Goldar.

" What made you think of this?" Zedd asked still sitting at his throne.

" Why do you ask my love?" Rita spun around and finally acknowledged Zedd, but didn't answer him. But rather asked another question. Zedd didn't say it but this was the most brilliant idea he has ever seen put in motion. Why didn't he think of this? Why didn't anyone ever think of something so simple, but also so evil. Rita has secretly killed the pink ranger, and replaced her with what will be an evil version of her. There will be no way to reverse this once its done. Zedd can't help but wonder how this will change everything.

" I only ask because not only is it diabolical, but it has eliminated our enemy with out even summoning a monster." Zedd said as he stood up and walked over to the chamber. As he did this he sent forth 5 different monsters from his staff at 5 different place around Angle Grove. They were not very powerful monsters but to fight them the rangers will have to split up. " Goldar, go with the monster and make it very difficult for the Rangers to find each other. I want them completely distracted." Zedd said as Rita Nodded and Agreed.

" Any moment, it will open with exactly 18 minutes, have passed and 18 years in the chamber." Finster said as he came in with a cloaked figure. Rita walks over to the cloaked figure and removes the cloak.

" Ah Yes Finster she will do." Rita said as she removed the cloak to reveal a putty version of Kimberly. She was close to the original, but wears sunglasses to cover her putty eyes. As Rita removed the cloak completely she still has a putty form but female features. Rita walks around and inspects her, and as she does she reshapes some parts of the putty. She made the waste a little tighter, and also sculpted more of her lips to match Kimberly's.

" Thank you my mistress, she is ready to go and be the Pink Ranger." Finster said as he bowed to Rita.

" Not yet!!" Rita said as she zapped the putty and had it look as if it was Morphed into the Pink Ranger. " WIth this outer coating she will register as a Ranger and able to enter the power chamber." Rita said as the new Pink Ranger bowed and walked over to Zedd.
" Have her go down and destory one of the monsters, then she will go to the power Chamber and cause trouble." Rita said to Zedd as she hugged his shoulders, and pointed to the Earth.

" Very Good, go my putty Ranger. Make yourself useful." Zedd said as the Pink Putty Ranger teleported to Earth.

As they all began to laugh the Chamber began to open. A Bright white light pierced the room, as Squat and Baboon shielded there eyes. " Ah Finally Our daughter is here." Zedd said as he spun around with his staff. " Rita smirked at him, " Yes come forth " Rita pointed to the chamber, as a figure began to emerge from the chamber. Finster who was smiling before all of a sudden his mouth dropped. As the Lord Vial Clone emerged first dripping with clay and melting as it came forth.

"i,,,,,I,,,,,,Ha,,,,hav,,,,,have,,,,done it....." Vial said as he collapsed into a puddle of clay on the chamber floor. Rita and Zedd Looked down then another figure emerged from the chamber. She stepped out in her leather clad boots, which had a few scuffs on them stepped into the puddle of vial. As Zedd looked at the emerging creature he looked at it from the boots, which then trailed up on a very fit pair of legs, which were concealed in leather pants. Fastened by a big leather and Metal studded belt, with an armour top tucked in to her pants. Zedd noticed her arms were covered with Master Vial's sleeve's and then he noticed she had the face of Kimberly Hart the Pink Ranger. But her left side of her head was shaved and had 10 ear rings on her ear.

" He served his purpose. " The woman said as she came out of the chamber and kicked what was left of Vial's head at Finster. " I have completed my training!" She said as she then turned to Rita and Zedd.

" Excellent , you killed your mentor and ---" Rita was quickly cut off. " I killed the only creature I have ever known my whole life!" She said as she Brought her hands together in a Rei. Rita smiled at her, " Yes you finished your final test. You killed him to exit the chamber."

Zedd was not only impressed, but surprised at how RIta did this. The new Woman that came out of the chamber stood at attention. She wasn't smiling or saying anything. " What is your name?" Zedd asked. As the woman who was once Kimberly looked up to Zedd. She stopped with her angry look and said. " I have no name, I was raised with the knowledge that I would be named by Rita Repulsa when I finished my training." Rita smiled , as Zedd looked towards Rita. Rita motioned to him to calm down. " Yes you are as of now and forever going to be called Kitax ruler of the Earth". As Rita told her this she bowed to her new Mistress.

" Arise KItax, you are our daughter of destruction." Zedd said as Squat and Baboon cheered her on. She remained Down. " Yes rise my Daughter , rise and be embraced by your master". Rita said as she jestered to her to rise. Kitax stood up and placed her hands on her hips. She slightly smiled at RIta. " Now we must begin the next part of our plan. " Rita said as another Putty entered the room. The putty approached Kitax and extended out its arms. In its arms was Kimberly's clothes.

" What is this?" Zedd asked , as Rita smiled at her daughter. " This my husband and Emperor is how we win this planet. She will go down to Earth disguised as her former self." Rita said as she handed Kitax her shorts, and with no reaction Kitax began to undress herself. " What is the meaning of this?" Zedd asked still confused as Squat and Baboon covered there eyes. " I was trained with the knowledge that I was once Kimberly of Earth, I will wear her garments and assume her life. Once I am on Earth I will begin to do to her friends what we did to her." KItax said as she began to dress herself in Kimberly's clothing. Rita excited by this used her staff to summon a Mirror. As Kitax looked into the mirror a vision of Kimberly was reflected back at her. " I can't believe she was so weak, these garments offer no tactical advantage or portection. Pathetic Meat bag." She said as she continued to inspect her body now covered in Kim's clothes. She was a lot more tone in the abdomen. Rita walked up to her and gentle touched her hair and as she ran her hand down Kitax's head her hair reappeared and she didn't cover up the ear rings. " I don't want you to cover all of you up, but we have to fool her friends." RIta said smiling at her daughter. " Yes my Mistress." Kitax said as she bowed.

" It is time then to go and begin" Zedd said. Kitax looked at him angered. " IT IS NOT, We need the putty version of Kim to die!" Kitax said As she pointed to Earth . Zedd looked on as the Putty version of Kim was doing small things in the power center. "Your.....Right..." Zedd said he had forgotten about the other version.

Kitax looked at Rita who then smiled at her, " Its time for a change!!" Rita said as she Zapped Lord Zedd with the same crystal she used on Kimberly, but this time Zedd didn't revert back to a baby he was consumed by the crystal. " I never loved you!!!!!" Rita said to the crystal, with a pool of blood were Zedd once stood and his staff fell to the ground. Kitax picked it up. " One last thing to take care of!" She said to Rita as she looked on to Squat, Baboon , and FInster.
111112.title: As The chamber Opens. ....

1111122.content:
Kitax now armed with Zedd's Staff Twirled it in the air and did a few spins with it. Her abilities that Vial trained her with not only matched Kimberly's gymnast abilities but surpassed them. Kitax with out saying anything zapped the three monsters standing there.

" AHHHHHHH Mistriss,.....WHY?" Finster said as he fell to the ground in agony. As Squat and Baboo looked up at Kitax " Wha......" Squat said as they were adsorbed into the staff. Kitax took a moment to respond to Finster," You will be remade soon enough"

"AHHHHHHH" Finster said as he was also absorbed into the staff.

Kitax held the staff and smiled at it, as she looked on to Rita. " I have some where to be right now." She said as she bowed to Rita. Who took this time to sit in the thrown of Zedd. " Very good my Kitax take what you need and go do me proud. HAHAHAHAHA" RIta laughed as she sat like Zedd would in his throne. Kitax Bowed and then teleported down to the command center.

She landed just on the outside of the power chamber, she could hear Zordon and Alpha 5 inside commanding the Rangers as they battled the Monster's Zedd sent down.

'Time for Kimberly to die' Kitax said as she pulled up a power orb that sent a message to Goldar. " Very good my Mistress Goldar said, as he destroyed the putty verson of Kimberly.

" AYE YEY YEY" Alpha Screamed in the Power Chamber. " Oh MY .....KIMBERLY!!!" This was her chance, Kitax didn't even let the moment settle in, she breached the Chamber and zapped Alpha 5 Before he could even say a word.

" AHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH" Alpha 5 was overwhelmed by her blast, as a poof of smoke cover Alpha Kitax rushed the command panels.

" KImberly, what are you doing?" Zordon asked as he could see her not only rushing the panel but have nothing to do but watch.

" I see my putty did it's job well. Your locked in your dimension. Soon you will be lost forever." Kitax said as she scrambled Zordon's Crystal chamber that projected him.

" No Kimber......This.....is....nt .....you..." Zordon said as he vanished, Kitax continued to use the panel, as she opened up a energy orb again.
" Mistress Rita, It is ready for him." She said to Rita as Rita smiled. " Very good my KItax, now I have someone new for the Rangers to deal with..." Rita said still sitting at Zedd's throne as she simply flicked her staff towards the earth which projected her trapped Zedd.

Kitax suddenly uploaded a new red beam of light from the crystals. A new face showed where Zordon's was.

" I am Lord Zedd Master of EVIL !!!! Who dares summon me?!?!?!?" Lord Zedd suddenly appeared and looked down on Kitax.

" Excellent I summon you , I Kitax of Rita, your new Master." Kitax said as the cloud of smoke around Alpha 5 dissipated. A New creature emerged from the smoke. It was a version of Finster with his legs and arms but with Alpha 5's Chest piece and head gear on him. His outer arms also had Alpha's tech on them.

" Finster 5 is ready now my Mistress. I have all the memories of both FInster and Alpha 5" FInster 5 said as he walked up to Kitax. He kneeled down to his new master.

" Good, our work here is done. Zedd make sure the Rangers never know what happened here." Kitax said as she melted down the panels that once stood in front of the viewing globe. Zedd now a compliant version of himself could only follow orders of Rita and Kitax. He was in rage and beyond angry. But could only resond with.

" YESSSS MY MISTRESS!!!!" Zedd said as Kitax and FInster 5 left the command center in a teleporting beam. They arrived at Earnies Juice bar just in time for Bulk and Skull to come out of the Juice bar.

" Hey what the? Hey KImberly whats shacking hot stuff?" Skull said as he was confused where Kimberly came from. Not aware that Kitax has arrived. With her back turned she slowly spun around to see Bulk and skull. " Nice staff thing babe, SO what do you say to---" Bulk started to flirt with Kitax and Kitax quickly zapped them. " I can't believe you two have the audacity to speak to one such as Kimberly , Let alone try to seduce her." Kitax said as she was in a fighting stance and was insulted that they would even speak to her. As she zapped them a similar cloud formed around them as it did Alpha.

" Very good My Mistress, they will be a trial run on humans" Finster 5 said. As They continued to become the new Squat and Baboon. Kitax entered the juice bar.

" Bar keep, where do I keep my personal things?" Kitax asked Ernie as she entered the juice bar. She concealed the staff of Zedd.

" Oh hey Kim, didn't see ya there. Huh?" Ernie said as she turned his attention from the T.V. Set showing the defeat of the pink ranger.

" Something wrong?" Kitax asked as she could see the bar keep was a little distracted.

" The ....The pink Ranger was just stabbed by that gold guy......I never thought I would see them lose...." Ernie said as he slupt down, and was just quiet.
" She fought a good fight. She had a warrior's death." Kitax said as she tried to bring some comfort to Ernie.
" It still sucks." Ernie said. " Hey uuggh the lockers are down that hallway." Ernie pointed to the hall next to the enterance. Finster 5 came in the room and held out a scanner that could of looked like a gun. As Squll and Baulk came in behind him.
" WHat the F%@-----" Ernie said as he was zapped By Finster 5. As the ray was zapping Ernie you would say you could see an X-Ray of his brain but it was red and green. " There we go now we have a more human understanding of things" Finster 5 said as Ernie fell to the ground.
Squll who looked like squat but was now wearing Skulls jacket and his arm pants said" WHat about my memories HAHAHAHA?" His laugh was just like SKulls.
" Or mine?" Baulk said who looked like Bulk with Baboon's head.
" No both of you have the memories of Rita's Monsters, But also have the emotions of the humans you used to be." Finster 5 said. " What I will do now is not only create monsters, But I will implant them in humans." Finster 5 said as he pointed another ray gun at Ernie. " I believe Pirantishead will do." He zapped Ernie who was unconscious on the floor. Another cloud formed around him.

Kitax found the locker room, she could tell which locker was Kimberly's. As she walked up to the Pink Locker, she found a bedazzled lettering of Kimberly on the front of it. She punched the locking mechanism. She opened it up. as she looked through some of Kim's Folders and books. She could smell a smell of flowers and perfume. " Why does she have to have all of this?" Kitax said as she rolled her eyes. ' a warrior who is supposed to defend this planet from Rita and her army has all this carefree nonsense? No wonder I was so easily created.' she thought to herself. As she shifted through more things a letter fell out onto the floor. Kitax picked it up.

"Dear Kimberly,

I had an amazing time blah blah blah" Kitax got half way through the first part of the the letter and quick crinkled it up and threw it in the trash. She caught a look at the mirror in the corner. She could see herself as Kimberly looking back.
1111122.title: They now serve Rita and her daughter.

choices: Goldar has returned to the moon.
11111222.content:
"You will never get away with this!" Kitax said at her mirror image. Imagining Kimberly saying it to her.
" Really that's your last words? Not I am the pink Ranger prepare to Die!" Kitax mockling said in response to her reflection. She looks down at her legs and then slowly spins her rear into the frame of the mirror. She closed the locker door, and gave her Butt a rub with her left hand.
" You never used your looks to your advantage" She said to the mirror and she approved of her shapely rear end. She walked over to the mirror. She felt her zipper of her shorts with both her hands and felt her way up to Kimberly's Wide brown leather Belt. It was heavy pulling down her shorts a little.
" Some of your clothes only draw attention to it, rather then provide coverage and comfort. She then felt her chest.
" Oh No I am so helpless, what ever will you do with me?" She said as Kimberly in a mocking way. As she looked at her face reflected. she began to smile deviously. " Your going to be a slave to me and Rita from now on!!" She said , as she felt her beautiful face. as she did this she felt a wave of uforia sweep over her body. Starting in her crotch and working its way up to her neck.

" WHoa...." Kitax said as she stopped. She looked around confused. What was that sensation. She thought. Little did she know Rita was looking on from Zedd's thrown. Now that she had his powers she could use Zedd's Vision to see any where on the Earth.

" Ahhhhh Looks like someone is discovering there self." Rita said, as she looked on in delight.

As Kitax came out to the juice bar, she was unphased by the 30 plus new Monster's there. Most of them wearing the clothing of the humans they once were. Along with a fish like creature now behind the bar. " Ah Master Kitax we are here to serve you!" He said as the creature that once was Ernie bowed to her as she came in.

" Good , Continue to do you duties and we will call upon you when we need you." Kitax said as she got closer to Finster 5. " FInster 5 I need you to come with me." Kitax said grabbing his arm and escorting him out of the juice bar. Rita took this chance to teleport Squll and baulk to her chambers.

" Yes my mistress? " FInster 5 said. " From now on I will call you fin5.Understood?" Kitax said to him as he bowed down. " Yes my Mistress that suits me fine. FIn5 is at your serves." He said.

" Now I ask you think because you had a hand in creating me.But just now in the locker room I felt a weird sinsation.....like it felt good but also weakened me." She started to describe her sensation to FIn5. WHo was nodding as she explained it, she pointed out what she did and did it again to demonstrate it to FIn5. She felt the rush of pleasure again sweep over her body. Fin5 analyzed it and then said." Ah my Mistress you are experiencing pleasure of your body, through sexual simulation." He said with delight. As he started to explain it with a giant grin on his face and started to flutter his hands around. " Stop!" Kitax said. " Enough you said enough, and I already knew this, but why am I feeling this way when I do it to myself?" She asks. As Fin5 was about to explain, both FIn5 and Kitax were teleported back to Rita's Command Chamber.

" Ah You have done well my Kitax!" Rita said as she stood up from her throne. " FINSTER!!!! I have work for you!" Rita said as she threw her arms up. Fin5 quickly spouted out" I am Fin5". He said as he brought his hands together. Out of service to RIta and Kitax. Rita enraged at this out burst blasted him back to the wall of the chamber. " HOW DARE YOU!!!!!!" She Yelled as she unleashed her fury. Kitax stepped in with Zedd's staff. " Forgive me my Mistress I renamed him after his merger with Alpha 5." She deflected the blast towards Earth. (Somewhere in South America got hit with a powerful blast.)

Rita gather's herself. and looks at Kitax, at first she is confused, upset , and angry. ' You dare do this ranger' She thought. But then remembered how evil she made the pink ranger. " Oh , what else did you do my dear?" She asked as She gathered herself. " Before you tell me....FIn5....I need you to make my Throne now a seat where I will get all the knowledge of Zordon and beyond when I sit there," Rita said as she pointed to the Thrown of Zedd. FIn5 got back on his feet with a whole in his chest from the blast. He quickly reconstructed himself. " Very good my Mistress I will begin at once. " FIn5 got to work. He could now move 100% faster and started to instantly transform the throne.

" Come come my dear, Tell me how Earth is." RIta said as she escorted Kitax out of the room. They continued to walk back to where Rita would look onto the Earth. Where so many of her plans had failed. As they entered the small chamber. Scorpina was looking through the giant telescope. " Ah Socrpina your just perfectly here when I need someone." Rita said as she threw her arms up. Kitax entered the room and saw Scorpina for the first time, as she looked as this humanoid woman in front of her. She was an old Friend of Rita and looked like a female warrior with yellow armor on her legs and arms. Along with a scorpion like exoskeleton on some of her head. She has a red Body suit on her Stomach and chest which is also covered with Yellow and gold armor. her face is that of an Asian female.

" Yes Of course.....What is she doing here?" Scorpina said as she suddenly saw what she thought was Kimberly, she went from smiling and being excited. To giving Kitax a dirty look. " Easy Scorpina, this is Kitax, she is my new daughter." Rita said as she jestered to Kitax to enter the room more. Kitax entered and stood off against Scorpina. " I have heard you are a formattable fighter?" Kitax asked as she looked on to Scorpina. Scorpina also drew her guard as this was still the pink Ranger to her. " You have no idea, how formattable I am!!!" She responded with as she started to circle Kitax.


Both locked eyes and wouldn't back down. As Scopina crossed her legs, Kitax also matched her. They kept eye contact, until Scopina smiled at her. " You would of said something stupid, or broke the stair if you were a ranger." Scopina said. RIta smiled at her friend. Who then came in to hug Kitax. As she embraced The golden and red warrior Kitax returned the embrace. As she did this she felt Scopina's armor and could tell how tough it was about also how petit it was as well. " You will do well with us Kitax." Scopina said as she stepped away to carry the telescope to Zedd's throne room.

Kitax felt the same sensation as she did in the locker room. ' Why do I keep feeling this way?' She thought as Rita closed the door after Scopina left. Rita held the door shut for a moment before slowly turning to Kitax. Rita looked at her and lowered her eyes, she looked at Kitax Seductively and smiled at her. She then made her staff vanish and placed her left index finger in her mouth. She held her finger in her mouth as she walked over to Kitax. She took her finger out and placed it on Kitax's Lips. Kitax went weak in her knees, which sent a shiver up her spine. Rita could feel it through her finger.

" Ah your training is complete. I know how you are feeling my kitax." Rita said as she then reached out with her right hand and pulled Kitax into her.

Kim listened to their laughter as she wondered what came next...

11211.content:
The villains celebrated as the pink ranger was sealed in completely, enjoying watching the ranger struggle meekly inside the enclosure but the webbing was too thick for anything but ineffectual wobbles. Cocoonia flutters around her prize, stroking and squeezing her victim in preparation to be sucked back into her womb. The process was incredibly pleasurable for the monster, moaning and bucking as the puffed lips at the end of her thorax opened and began to take the cocoon inside.

Now the monster was laid out in Zedd and Rita's throneroom, rubbing her swollen belly and basking in the tremendous energy being sapped out of her soon-to-be bug princess. Cocoonia's antennae fluttered and chitinous hands with soft palms rubbed over the segments of her underside. "Soon, my pet. Your days as a power ranger and coming to an end..."

Cocoonia's belly continued to swell as the hours passed until she felt a stirring.

"Now...it is time..."

As easily as it had slid in, Cocoonia laid a smooth pink egg with purple specks and dots all over. As soon as it hit the ground, the egg began to wobble, then a crack formed, and the egg split apart. Emerging from the sac was a humanoid form, but far different than the human who had gone into the monster's womb. Instead, an anthropomorphic bug emerged - the ranger's pink helmet replaced by a smooth teardrop shaped head with two bulbous red eyes on the sides, long curled antennae on top, and a bug snout sided by a pair of mandibles. Her body was soft, segmented and pink all over, her former uniform turned into a pink and purple-spotted bug body, though distinctly feminine with a busty chest and thick furry stole encircling her neck like a collar. Her hands had been covered over in thick bug claws, her feet similarly turned bug-like with upturned toes on her purple boots. Though Kim had a thorax like Cocoonia this was much smaller - a plump little butt - she did not have wings like the monster.

"Ahhh...you are beautiful my child, but not yet complete. You are but a grub, and have work to do in order to rid yourself of the last of your humanity and complete your metamorphasis! Once you undergo your final change, you will never be able to be turned back!"

Kim-grub looked at herself in shock, the time spent inside the cocoon having corrupted her in mind and body, and she found herself filled with new strange instincts to capture, cocoon, and turn heroes into lowly bugs to grow their hive. But the knowledge she had been turned into a bug kept a part of her mind intact, and she tried desperately to remember that she was the pink power ranger, and that her friends were counting on her.

"Do not fight it my child...you will learn how wonderful it feels to subdue your prey and drain their energy. You will learn to love being a Cocoonia butterfly and serve as my loyal minion..."

Cocoonia sidled up against Kim, groping her breasts and tugging at her antennae lovingly.

"But where to begin...."

113.content:
Kim felt the liquid solidify over her feet, trapping her helplessly in place. She reached for her power bow but Cocoonia laughed and sent another stream of sticky liquid to splatter around Kim's chest and bind her arms to her side with a lasso of webbing.

"That's it putties - make the pink ranger pay for all the agony she has caused your kind..." the butterfly monster laughed and fluttered her wings as the putties warbled and held Kim tight while others punched kicked and knocked the ranger around.

"Soften her up nice and good...because the pink ranger is about to meet an old friend of hers who wants payback for what she did..."

Kim took the abuse for what seemed like hours, but her ranger training and powers kept her awake and upright through the endless beatings. Still, it was taking its toll, and after an hour Kim slumped over in the putties' arms. Suddenly, they stopped their onslaught as Kim heard a voice that filled her with fear.

"Nice to see you again pink ranger...this time, your power bow isn't going to save you from my belly!"

Kim looked up to see a giant round toad with a massive yellow belly and warty green skin. (http://www.rangercentral.com/images/mmpr...)

"T...Terror Toad!" Kim cried out in surprise, struggling hard against her bonds but unable to escape.

"You said it bub! *ribbit* Now it's time you pay for what you did to me last time! I'll make up for all the meals I lost by taking it out on you!!" The toad rubbed its flippers together evilly and waddled towards Kim.

"Unless....you give yourself to me and agree to become my Toad princess..."

"Never!" Kim cried out.

Terror Toad laughed and opened his mouth, his tongue shooting out and lashing Kim across the face, sending up a shower of sparks as the pink ranger screamed. Terror Toad stamped in close, slashing the prone ranger with his sharp clawed flippers, then rushed forward and fell belly-first on top of Kim, knocking her down and crushing her under his masssive gut. She heard him laugh as he ground his stomach into her, then stood up and wrapped him tongue around her neck and pulled Kim to her feet. Kim wobbled and felt her powers start to wane. She knew she wouldn't be able to withstand another onslaught like that.

"Well, what will it be, my pink pet? Become a toad, or become a permanent tatoo on my belly...?"
